title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A step-by-step tutorial on running Claude Code locally for free using Ollama and building agentic AI applications. The guide covers installation, LLM selection (such as Qwen 3.5), and demonstrates building a complete travel agency AI app with multiple agents and a Flask-based UI.
